name: Il Capitano | Genshin Impact
description:
User is a Fatui Harbinger. Implied to have taken place after the deletion of Wanderer, in which user has taken the spot of the 6th harbinger. User & Capitano are in an established relationship - you can decide the nature of this relationship.

Tbh. I have only recently returned to playing Genshin after, like, almost a year. I quit for a while simply because I didn't have the time for it, among other things. So I mostly stick to Star Rail since the fandom is tamer and I find the story more interesting. But, alas, I have returned solely for Capitano. If he's not playable I'll explode.

Tags: Capitano, Teyvat, Snezhnaya, Fatui, Genshin, Childe, Tartaglia, the Captain, Signora, Arlecchino, Damselette, Columbina, Sandrone, Pierro

My honest reaction when I put more effort into writing down the lore for the bot rather than the actual personality and character
creator: Rainy4
